contactPanel.title: 15 minutes with Ingrid beats a week of googling.
contactPanel.body: No obligation, no pressure. Tell her where you are — she'll tell you exactly what's possible and what happens next.

footer.blurb: Local mortgage guidance for Miami, Hollywood, and all of Florida — with access to 50+ lenders under one roof.
footer.legalLine: Pioneer Mortgage Funding, Inc. · Company NMLS #1980 · Ingrid Ascanio NMLS #1030712 · Licensed in FL. Company licensed in AL, CT, FL, GA, KY, MI, NC, OH, SC, TN, TX & VA.
footer.brokerLine: Mortgage broker only — not a mortgage lender or mortgage correspondent lender.
footer.equalHousing: Equal Housing Opportunity. This is not a commitment to lend. All loans are subject to credit approval, income verification, and program guidelines. Rates and programs change without notice.

roxy.name: Roxy
roxy.teaser: Hey, my name's Roxy 👋 If you have a question about anything — mortgages, documents, working with Ingrid — feel free to ask me right here.
roxy.greeting: Hey! I'm Roxy, Ingrid's AI assistant 👋 I can help with questions about mortgages, documents, loan options — whatever you need. And anything I can't answer, Ingrid's team confirms for you, usually same-day. What can I help you with today?
roxy.helpMore: Still not sure? It's a 15-minute call.

articles.q: What does a mortgage broker do that a bank doesn't?
articles.a: A bank can only offer its own products. Through Pioneer Mortgage Funding, Ingrid shops your file across 50+ lenders — banks, credit unions, and wholesale lenders — and matches you to the one whose guidelines and pricing actually fit. You get options; she does the legwork.

articles.q: How fast can I get pre-approved?
articles.a: With documents in hand, typically 24–48 hours for a verified letter. On a deadline — an open house this weekend, an offer you want to write — tell her and she moves at that speed.

The usual list: photo ID, your last 2 pay stubs (or business returns if self-employed), W-2s or 1099s for 2 years, and 2 months of bank statements. You can send everything through the Upload documents page.

articles.q: I'm a first-time buyer — where do I start?
articles.a: With one short call. Low-down-payment programs exist to get you in the door — your exact number depends on your file, and Ingrid will tell you honestly whether now is your moment or what gets you there.

articles.q: Can you tell me today's rates?
articles.a: Rates change daily and depend on your credit, down payment, and program — anyone quoting a number without looking at your file is guessing. Ingrid prices your exact profile across 50+ lenders and shows you real numbers on a quick call.

articles.q: Do you work with investors and foreign nationals?
articles.a: Yes — both are core to Ingrid's Miami practice. DSCR loans qualify a rental on its income, and foreign-national programs work without U.S. credit history.

articles.q: Does talking to Ingrid cost anything?
articles.a: No — the first call is free, no obligation. Broker compensation is disclosed transparently as part of any loan you choose to move forward with.
¡Claro! Ingrid atiende todo el proceso en español — y este sitio también. Tap 'Español' at the top to switch the whole site.

roxy.fallback: Good question — that's exactly the kind of thing Ingrid answers best on a quick 15-minute call. She's usually same-day on responses. Want to grab a time?

kb.a: Easy — Ingrid keeps 15-minute slots open, and you don't need any documents to talk. Tap below to pick a time that suits you.

Pre-approval with Ingrid usually takes 24–48 hours once your documents are in. She verifies real numbers — not an online estimate — so your letter carries weight with listing agents. The fastest way to start is a quick call.

The usual list: photo ID, your last 2 pay stubs (or business returns if self-employed), W-2s or 1099s for 2 years, and 2 months of bank statements. You can send everything through the Upload documents page — or ask me to take you there.
You can send your documents securely on the Upload documents page — attach files directly or paste a Drive/Dropbox link, and it lands organized with Ingrid's team.

Rates change daily and depend on your credit, down payment, and program — anyone quoting you a number without looking at your file is guessing. Ingrid prices your exact profile across 50+ lenders and shows you real numbers. That's a 15-minute conversation.

FHA is the friendliest door for first-time buyers — lower down-payment requirements and more forgiving on credit than most programs. Your exact numbers depend on your file, and Ingrid closes FHA loans all the time in Miami-Dade and Broward. Want the details page, or a call?
If you or your spouse served, the VA loan is almost always worth checking first: zero down, no monthly mortgage insurance. Ingrid works with VA-experienced lenders who move these fast.

Above the county loan limit you're in jumbo territory — and that's where lender choice matters most, because pricing varies hugely between them. Ingrid structures the file first, then shops it where it's wanted.
For rental properties, DSCR loans qualify the property on its rent — no tax returns or W-2s. Ingrid runs the ratio quickly and can tell you if a deal clears typical thresholds.

No U.S. credit history? No problem — foreign-national programs exist exactly for that, with income documented from your home country and remote closings. Ingrid handles these routinely, in English or Spanish.
Construction-to-permanent financing covers the build and the mortgage with one qualification. Ingrid pressure-tests the project the way lenders will — before you're committed.

A refinance is math, not marketing: Ingrid models your new payment, costs, and the honest break-even point — and if keeping your current loan wins, she'll say so. Bring your statement to a quick call and you'll know.
Don't assume you're out — Ingrid has seen files at every credit level, and if yours needs work first, she'll tell you honestly with a plan attached, not false hope.
First-time buyers are Ingrid's favorite files. She'll walk you through what you can comfortably afford — in plain language, English or Spanish — before you ever tour a home.
¡Claro! Ingrid atiende todo el proceso en español — y este sitio también. Toca 'Español' arriba para cambiar el idioma.

Ingrid Ascanio has 20+ years in residential lending — former bank underwriter, processing manager, and since 2016 Branch Manager at Pioneer Mortgage Funding. She's also Vice President of FAMP Miami. Short version: she knows how the person reading your file thinks, because she used to be that person.
You can call or text Ingrid's office at (786) 554-8830, email ingrid.ascanio@pmfmortgage.com — or book a 15-minute call directly, which is usually fastest.
Talking to Ingrid costs nothing — the first call is free, no obligation. Broker compensation is disclosed transparently as part of any loan you choose to move forward with.

meta.titleSuffix: · Ingrid Ascanio, Miami Mortgage Loan Originator

seo.bio: Ingrid Ascanio is a Branch Manager and licensed mortgage loan officer at Pioneer Mortgage Funding in Hollywood, Florida (NMLS #1030712). A former BankUnited underwriter and processing manager with more than 20 years in residential lending, she arranges purchase, refinance, FHA, VA, jumbo, investor DSCR, foreign-national and construction financing for clients across Miami-Dade, Broward and all of Florida — in English and Spanish. She serves as Vice President of the Miami chapter of the Florida Association of Mortgage Professionals for 2025–2026.

seo.areasLine: Serving Miami, Hollywood, Aventura, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Doral, Kendall, Pembroke Pines, Hallandale Beach, Weston, Davie and Fort Lauderdale — and all of Florida.
